what_it_does: Defines a 24 by 24 SVG video player icon with a screen outline, filled play triangle, baseline control bar, and circular scrubber marker.
observations: Root svg uses viewBox 0 0 24 24 with explicit width and height of 24.
Default styling is fill="none", stroke="currentColor", stroke-width="1.5", stroke-linecap="round", and stroke-linejoin="round".
A rounded rectangle from x=3 y=5 width=18 height=12 forms the player frame.
A filled currentColor triangular play glyph sits inside the frame using a path from 10,9 to 15,12 to 10,15.
A horizontal control line runs from x=3 to x=21 at y=19.
A circle at cx=6 cy=19 r=1 marks a control position on the line.
standouts: Combines stroke-based outline geometry with a filled play symbol in the same currentColor icon.
Uses compact inline SVG markup with no ids, classes, scripts, or embedded metadata.
conventions: Follows common icon conventions: 24px canvas, currentColor theming, rounded stroke caps and joins, and simple geometric primitives.
Uses an explicit fill override on the play path while the rest of the icon inherits fill="none".
Keeps the icon self-contained with no external references.
concerns: The scrubber circle inherits fill="none", so the horizontal line remains visible through its center.
notes: This file is a themable SVG icon representing a video player with playback and timeline controls.
questions: Should the scrubber circle remain outline-only, or should it be filled to mask the control line behind it?
purpose_vs_actual: The filename indicates a video-player icon, and the SVG content draws a video player symbol.
intention_signals: It seems intended to provide a reusable UI icon for video playback or media player controls in a design system.
contribution: Contributes a compact, currentColor-compatible video player glyph with screen, play, timeline, and scrubber elements for reuse in icon surfaces.
summary_for_embedding: A 24px SVG video player icon composed of a rounded screen outline, filled play triangle, timeline line, and circular scrubber marker.
intention_for_embedding: This was for representing video playback or media player functionality as a reusable design-system icon.
